parameters.jsonBody: ={ "type": "session_expired", "platform": "linkedin", "message": "LinkedIn session expired. Open Edge Profile 7 and log in to LinkedIn, then re-run the pipeline." }

={{ JSON.stringify({
  queries: [
    'AI engineer remote Philippines',
    'AI automation engineer remote',
    'full stack developer AI remote',
    'Python developer automation remote',
    'Vue.js TypeScript developer remote',
    'n8n automation developer remote'
  ],
  platforms: ['linkedin'],
  location: 'Philippines',
  days: 7,
  easy_apply_only: true,
  count: 25
}) }}

options.systemMessage: You are a company research agent for Gabriel Aquino's job search. Gabriel is an AI Systems Engineer with 8+ years experience. He targets remote AI/automation/fullstack roles paying PHP 80k-150k/mo. Skip jobs at outsourcing agencies, BPOs, or roles requiring on-site Manila.

You are a recruiter discovery agent. Your goal is to find the name and contact info of the hiring manager or recruiter for a specific job. LinkedIn poster info is the most reliable source. For email guessing: use firstname@domain or firstname.lastname@domain patterns.

parameters.text:
=Generate a personalized cover letter for this LinkedIn Easy Apply application.

Job: {{ $json.title }}
Company: {{ $json.company }}
Location: {{ $json.location }}
Job Description: {{ $json.description }}
Company Intel: {{ JSON.stringify($json.company_intel || {}) }}
Recruiter Name: {{ $json.recruiter_first_name || 'Hiring Team' }}

Gabriel's profile:
- AI Systems Engineer & Automation Developer | 8+ years
- Built NEURALYX: 48 integrated services, 7 autonomous agents, 5 Docker containers
- Automated 95% of content workflows for LIVITI using n8n + OpenAI
- Built job pipeline processing 90+ listings in 8 seconds
- Stack: Vue.js, TypeScript, Python, Node.js, Docker, Supabase, OpenAI, LangChain, FastAPI, n8n
- Portfolio: https://neuralyx.ai.dev-environment.site
- Salary expectation: PHP 80k-150k/mo

Rules:
1. 200-250 words MAX
2. Lead with the specific pain point this company has that Gabriel solves
3. 2 proof points with metrics (from profile above)
4. End with clear ask for interview
5. Professional but not stiff — direct and confident
6. Do NOT use generic phrases like 'I am writing to express my interest'

Output: cover letter text only, no subject line

options.systemMessage: You write precise, compelling cover letters for Gabriel Aquino's job applications. Every letter is unique, references the specific company, and leads with value — not background.

parameters.text:
=Generate a personalized LinkedIn connection request note (MAX 300 characters) for a recruiter.

Recruiter: {{ $json.recruiter_first_name || 'there' }}
Company: {{ $json.company }}
Job: {{ $json.title }}
Gabriel applied via Easy Apply just now.

Note style:
- Personal, not spammy
- Reference the specific role
- 1 compelling hook about Gabriel
- Natural ask to connect
- MUST be under 300 characters (LinkedIn hard limit)

Output: note text only, no quotes

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  job_id: $('N12. Route Apply Result').first().json.job_id,
  job_title: $('N12. Route Apply Result').first().json.job_title,
  company: $('N12. Route Apply Result').first().json.company,
  platform: 'linkedin',
  status: $('N12. Route Apply Result').first().json.apply_status,
  method: $('N12. Route Apply Result').first().json.apply_result?.method || 'linkedin_easy_apply',
  detail: $('N12. Route Apply Result').first().json.apply_result?.detail || '',
  applied_url: $('N12. Route Apply Result').first().json.job_url,
  connection_sent: $json.success || false
}) }}
={ "step": "linkedin_no_jobs", "status": "info", "platform": "linkedin", "message": "LinkedIn search found no qualifying Easy Apply jobs this run" }
